candidates.why: Visible separate operating D&A summary line, but it is a company-wide total that also includes SG&A/R&D and impairment, so it cannot be cleanly assigned to the selected COGS bucket 'Raw materials and consumables'.
Separate operating depreciation line, but not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and appears to be broader than the selected COGS bucket.
Separate amortization line, but not identified as production/COGS-related.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The visible D&A rows are broad operating totals or non-COGS-specific components, so adding any of them to COGS would risk misclassification and double counting.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A row tied to R&D. Since XRD final_choice is empty and no separate above-EBIT R&D expense row was selected, this is the clearest SG&A-related/R&D-related D&A item that may need to be added separately later.
Separate same-level operating D&A summary, but it includes impairment and likely spans multiple buckets including non-SG&A items, so using it would be too broad.
Separate depreciation line above EBIT, but not specifically linked to SG&A and could include production or other operating functions.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Included only the explicit R&D amortization row. This follows the special-case rule: XRD has no separate selected expense row, so this visible R&D D&A line may need to be added to XSGA_DA. Broader D&A summary lines were excluded because they are not cleanly attributable to the selected XSGA bucket and could double count or include prohibited impairment.
